notes_ja: Windows標準のウィンドウスナップ（画面端ドラッグで分割表示）に対応。全画面まわりを改善（上端でタイトルバー出現・閲覧中Escで本棚へ）。マウスホイールをページ送りに切替可能に。本棚一覧から「登録せず開く」「全本棚を横断検索」、D&Dで登録/閲覧。続きダイアログの効果音を解消ほか。
notes_en: Added native Windows window snapping (drag to a screen edge to split). Improved fullscreen handling (title bar reveals at the top edge; Esc returns to the shelves while reading). Mouse wheel can now turn pages. New 'open without adding' and 'search all shelves' on the start screen, plus drag-and-drop to add or open. Removed the sound on the resume dialog, and more.
